Services/ApiAuthTokenHandler.cs
using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;
using System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt;
using System.Security.Claims;
using System.Text;

namespace LibraryMPT.Services;

public sealed class ApiAuthTokenHandler : DelegatingHandler
{
    private readonly IHttpContextAccessor _httpContextAccessor;
    private readonly IConfiguration _configuration;

    public ApiAuthTokenHandler(IHttpContextAccessor httpContextAccessor, IConfiguration configuration)
    {
        _httpContextAccessor = httpContextAccessor;
        _configuration = configuration;
    }

    protected override Task<HttpResponseMessage> SendAsync(HttpRequestMessage request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var httpContext = _httpContextAccessor.HttpContext;
        var user = httpContext?.User;
        if (user?.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true)
        {
            var token = BuildToken(user);
            request.Headers.Authorization = new System.Net.Http.Headers.AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", token);
        }

        return base.SendAsync(request, cancellationToken);
    }

    private string BuildToken(ClaimsPrincipal user)
    {
        var issuer = _configuration["JwtSettings:Issuer"] ?? "LibraryMPT";
        var audience = _configuration["JwtSettings:Audience"] ?? "LibraryMPT.Api";
        var key = _configuration["JwtSettings:Key"] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("JwtSettings:Key is missing.");
        var signingKey = new SymmetricSecurityKey(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(key));
        var creds = new SigningCredentials(signingKey, SecurityAlgorithms.HmacSha256);

        var claims = new List<Claim>();
        var userId = user.FindFirst(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
        var username = user.FindFirst(ClaimTypes.Name)?.Value;
        var roles = user.FindAll(ClaimTypes.Role).Select(r => r.Value).Distinct().ToList();

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(userId))
            claims.Add(new Claim(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier, userId));
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(username))
            claims.Add(new Claim(ClaimTypes.Name, username));
        claims.AddRange(roles.Select(role => new Claim(ClaimTypes.Role, role)));

        var token = new JwtSecurityToken(
            issuer: issuer,
            audience: audience,
            claims: claims,
            expires: DateTime.UtcNow.AddMinutes(15),
            signingCredentials: creds);

        return new JwtSecurityTokenHandler().WriteToken(token);
    }
}


Services/BookService.cs
 

Services/EmailService.cs
using MailKit.Net.Smtp;
using MailKit.Security;
using MimeKit;

namespace LibraryMPT.Services
{
    public class EmailService
    {
        public static long? LastSendDurationMs { get; private set; }
        public static DateTime? LastSendUtc { get; private set; }
        public static string? LastSendError { get; private set; }

        private readonly string _smtpHost;
        private readonly int _smtpPort;
        private readonly string _smtpUser;
        private readonly string _smtpPass;
        private readonly string _fromEmail;
        private readonly int _smtpTimeoutMs;
        private readonly SecureSocketOptions _socketOptions;
        private readonly SmtpEndpoint _primaryEndpoint;
        private readonly SmtpEndpoint? _fallbackEndpoint;

        public EmailService(IConfiguration configuration)
        {
            var smtpSettings = configuration.GetSection("SmtpSettings");
            _smtpHost = (smtpSettings["SmtpHost"] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("SmtpHost не настроен")).Trim();
            _smtpPort = int.Parse(smtpSettings["SmtpPort"] ?? "587");
            _smtpUser = (smtpSettings["SmtpUser"] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("SmtpUser не настроен")).Trim();
            _smtpPass = (smtpSettings["SmtpPass"] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("SmtpPass не настроен")).Trim();
            _fromEmail = (smtpSettings["FromEmail"] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("FromEmail не настроен")).Trim();
            _smtpTimeoutMs = int.TryParse(smtpSettings["SmtpTimeoutMs"], out var toMs) && toMs >= 5000 ? toMs : 120000;
            var sec = (smtpSettings["SmtpSocketSecurity"] ?? "").Trim();
            if (string.Equals(sec, "SslOnConnect", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || _smtpPort == 465)
            {
                _socketOptions = SecureSocketOptions.SslOnConnect;
            }
            else if (string.Equals(sec, "None", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                _socketOptions = SecureSocketOptions.None;
            }
            else if (string.Equals(sec, "Auto", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                _socketOptions = SecureSocketOptions.Auto;
            }
            else
            {
                _socketOptions = SecureSocketOptions.StartTls;
            }

            _primaryEndpoint = new SmtpEndpoint(
                _smtpHost,
                _smtpPort,
                _smtpUser,
                _smtpPass,
                _socketOptions,
                _fromEmail);
            _fallbackEndpoint = BuildFallbackEndpoint(configuration.GetSection("SmtpFallbackSettings"));
        }

        public async Task SendPasswordResetEmailAsync(string toEmail, string resetLink)
        {
            var subject = "Восстановление пароля - Электронная библиотека МПТ";
            var body = $@"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset=""utf-8"">
    <style>
        body {{ font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }}
        .container {{ max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; }}
        .header {{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0; }}
        .content {{ background: #f9f9f9; padding: 30px; border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px; }}
        .button {{ display: inline-block; padding: 12px 30px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; margin: 20px 0; }}
        .footer {{ text-align: center; margin-top: 20px; color: #666; font-size: 12px; }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=""container"">
        <div class=""header"">
            <h2>Восстановление пароля</h2>
        </div>
        <div class=""content"">
            <p>Здравствуйте!</p>
            <p>Вы запросили восстановление пароля для вашего аккаунта в электронной библиотеке МПТ.</p>
            <p>Для восстановления пароля перейдите по ссылке ниже:</p>
            <p style=""text-align: center;"">
                <a href=""{resetLink}"" class=""button"">Восстановить пароль</a>
            </p>
            <p>Если кнопка не работает, скопируйте и вставьте следующую ссылку в браузер:</p>
            <p style=""word-break: break-all; color: #667eea;"">{resetLink}</p>
            <p><strong>Важно:</strong> Ссылка действительна в течение 24 часов.</p>
            <p>Если вы не запрашивали восстановление пароля, просто проигнорируйте это письмо.</p>
        </div>
        <div class=""footer"">
            <p>С уважением,<br>Команда электронной библиотеки МПТ</p>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>";

            await SendEmailAsync(toEmail, subject, body);
        }

        private async Task SendEmailAsync(string toEmail, string subject, string body)
        {
            var message = new MimeMessage();
            message.To.Add(MailboxAddress.Parse(toEmail));
            message.Subject = subject;
            message.Body = new TextPart("html") { Text = body };

            try
            {
                var sw = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
                await SendViaEndpointAsync(message, _primaryEndpoint);
                sw.Stop();
                LastSendDurationMs = sw.ElapsedMilliseconds;
                LastSendUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
                LastSendError = null;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                if (_fallbackEndpoint is not null)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        await SendViaEndpointAsync(message, _fallbackEndpoint);
                        LastSendDurationMs = null;
                        LastSendUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
                        LastSendError = null;
                        return;
                    }
                    catch (Exception fallbackEx)
                    {
                        LastSendError = $"{ex.Message} | fallback: {fallbackEx.Message}";
                        throw new InvalidOperationException(
                            $"Ошибка при отправке email через основной SMTP ({_smtpHost}:{_smtpPort}) и резервный SMTP ({_fallbackEndpoint.Host}:{_fallbackEndpoint.Port}): {fallbackEx.Message}",
                            fallbackEx);
                    }
                }

                LastSendError = ex.Message;
                throw new InvalidOperationException(
                    $"Ошибка при отправке email (SMTP: {_smtpHost}:{_smtpPort}): {ex.Message}",
                    ex);
            }
        }

        private async Task SendViaEndpointAsync(MimeMessage message, SmtpEndpoint endpoint)
        {
            var appPassword = (endpoint.Password ?? string.Empty).Replace(" ", "");
            message.From.Clear();
            message.From.Add(MailboxAddress.Parse(endpoint.FromEmail));
            using var client = new MailKit.Net.Smtp.SmtpClient();
            client.Timeout = _smtpTimeoutMs;
            await client.ConnectAsync(endpoint.Host, endpoint.Port, endpoint.SocketOptions);
            await client.AuthenticateAsync(endpoint.User, appPassword);
            await client.SendAsync(message);
            await client.DisconnectAsync(true);
        }

        private static SmtpEndpoint? BuildFallbackEndpoint(IConfigurationSection section)
        {
            var host = section["SmtpHost"]?.Trim();
            var user = section["SmtpUser"]?.Trim();
            var pass = section["SmtpPass"]?.Trim();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(host) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pass))
                return null;

            var port = int.TryParse(section["SmtpPort"], out var p) ? p : 465;
            var sec = (section["SmtpSocketSecurity"] ?? "").Trim();
            var socketOptions = string.Equals(sec, "StartTls", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                ? SecureSocketOptions.StartTls
                : string.Equals(sec, "None", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    ? SecureSocketOptions.None
                    : string.Equals(sec, "Auto", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                        ? SecureSocketOptions.Auto
                        : SecureSocketOptions.SslOnConnect;

            var fromEmail = section["FromEmail"]?.Trim();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(fromEmail))
                fromEmail = user;

            return new SmtpEndpoint(host, port, user, pass, socketOptions, fromEmail);
        }

        private sealed record SmtpEndpoint(
            string Host,
            int Port,
            string User,
            string Password,
            SecureSocketOptions SocketOptions,
            string FromEmail);

        public async Task SendStaffRegistrationEmailAsync(
            string toEmail,
            string firstName,
            string lastName,
            string username,
            string password,
            string roleName,
            string loginUrl)
        {
            var subject = "Регистрация в системе электронной библиотеки МПТ";
            var roleDisplayName = roleName switch
            {
                "Admin" => "Администратор",
                "Librarian" => "Библиотекарь",
                "InstitutionRepresentative" => "Представитель учебного заведения",
                _ => "Сотрудник"
            };

            var body = $@"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset=""utf-8"">
    <style>
        body {{ font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }}
        .container {{ max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; }}
        .header {{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0; }}
        .content {{ background: #f9f9f9; padding: 30px; border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px; }}
        .credentials-box {{ background: white; border: 2px solid #667eea; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin: 20px 0; }}
        .credential-item {{ margin: 10px 0; padding: 10px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 5px; }}
        .credential-label {{ font-weight: 600; color: #667eea; }}
        .credential-value {{ font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.1em; color: #333; word-break: break-all; }}
        .password-box {{ background: #fff3cd; border-left: 4px solid #f39c12; padding: 15px; margin: 15px 0; }}
        .footer {{ text-align: center; margin-top: 20px; color: #666; font-size: 12px; }}
        .warning {{ background: #f8d7da; border-left: 4px solid #dc3545; padding: 15px; margin: 15px 0; color: #721c24; }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=""container"">
        <div class=""header"">
            <h2>Добро пожаловать в систему!</h2>
        </div>
        <div class=""content"">
            <p>Здравствуйте, <strong>{firstName} {lastName}</strong>!</p>
            <p>Ваш аккаунт был успешно создан администратором в системе электронной библиотеки МПТ.</p>
            
            <div class=""credentials-box"">

                <div class=""credential-item"">
                    <div class=""credential-label"">Роль:</div>
                    <div>{roleDisplayName}</div>
                </div>

                    <div class=""credential-label"">Логин:</div>
                    <div class=""credential-value"">{username}</div>
                </div>
                
                <div class=""password-box"">
                    <div class=""credential-label"">🔑 Пароль:</div>
                    <div class=""credential-value"">{password}</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class=""warning"">
                <strong>⚠️ Важно:</strong> Сохраните эти данные в безопасном месте. Рекомендуется изменить пароль после первого входа в систему.
            </div>

            <p>Для входа в систему перейдите по адресу: <a href=""{loginUrl}"">{loginUrl}</a></p>
            
            <p>Если у вас возникнут вопросы, обратитесь к администратору системы.</p>
        </div>
        <div class=""footer"">
            <p>С уважением,<br>Команда электронной библиотеки МПТ</p>
        </div>
    </div>

        public async Task SendTwoFactorCodeEmailAsync(string toEmail, string code, string? firstName)
        {
            var subject = "Код двухфакторной аутентификации - Электронная библиотека МПТ";
            var displayName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(firstName) ? "Пользователь" : firstName;
            var body = $@"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset=""utf-8"">
    <style>
        body {{ font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }}
        .container {{ max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; }}
        .header {{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0; }}
        .content {{ background: #f9f9f9; padding: 30px; border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px; }}
        .code-box {{ background: white; border: 3px solid #667eea; border-radius: 10px; padding: 30px; text-align: center; margin: 20px 0; }}
        .code {{ font-size: 36px; font-weight: bold; color: #667eea; letter-spacing: 8px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; }}
        .warning {{ background: #fff3cd; border-left: 4px solid #f39c12; padding: 15px; margin: 15px 0; color: #856404; }}
        .footer {{ text-align: center; margin-top: 20px; color: #666; font-size: 12px; }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=""container"">
        <div class=""header"">
            <h2>🔒 Код двухфакторной аутентификации</h2>
        </div>
        <div class=""content"">
            <p>Здравствуйте, <strong>{displayName}</strong>!</p>
            <p>Вы запросили вход в систему электронной библиотеки МПТ с двухфакторной аутентификацией.</p>
            
            <div class=""code-box"">
                <p style=""margin: 0 0 10px 0; color: #666;"">Ваш код подтверждения:</p>
                <div class=""code"">{code}</div>
            </div>

            <div class=""warning"">
                <strong>⚠️ Важно:</strong> Этот код действителен в течение 20 минут. Никому не сообщайте этот код!
            </div>

            <p>Если вы не запрашивали вход в систему, немедленно измените пароль и обратитесь к администратору.</p>
        </div>
        <div class=""footer"">
            <p>С уважением,<br>Команда электронной библиотеки МПТ</p>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>";

            await SendEmailAsync(toEmail, subject, body);
        }
    }
}

                        <label class="form-check-label" for="registrationRoleStudent">Студент</label>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-check">
                        <input class="form-check-input" type="radio" name="registrationRole" id="registrationRoleInstitution" value="InstitutionRepresentative" />
                        <label class="form-check-label" for="registrationRoleInstitution">Представитель учебного заведения</label>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-3 d-none" id="facultyNameBlock">
                    <label class="form-label">Название учебного заведения</label>
                    <input name="facultyName"
                           id="facultyNameInput"
                           class="form-control rounded-xl"
                           maxlength="200"
                           placeholder="Например: Технический университет" />
                    <small class="text-muted">Если такое учебное заведение уже есть в системе, мы привяжем вас к нему.</small>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="form-label">Пароль</label>
                    <input type="password"
                           name="password"
                           class="form-control rounded-xl"
                           required />
                </div>

                <div class="form-check mb-4">
                    <input class="form-check-input"
                           type="checkbox"
                           id="personalDataConsent"
                           name="personalDataConsent"
                           value="true"
                           required />
                    <label class="form-check-label" for="personalDataConsent">
                        Согласен(на) на обработку персональных данных и условия
                        <a href="@Url.Action("Privacy", "Home")" target="_blank">политики конфиденциальности</a>
                    </label>
                </div>

                <button type="submit"
                        class="btn btn-success-custom btn-custom w-100 mb-3">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-check me-2"></i>Создать аккаунт
                </button>
            </form>

            <div class="text-center">
                <a href="@Url.Action("Login", "Account")"
                   class="btn btn-link">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i>Уже есть аккаунт
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (() => {
            const studentRadio = document.getElementById('registrationRoleStudent');
            const institutionRadio = document.getElementById('registrationRoleInstitution');
            const facultyBlock = document.getElementById('facultyNameBlock');
            const facultyInput = document.getElementById('facultyNameInput');

            const syncFacultyVisibility = () => {
                const isInstitution = !!institutionRadio?.checked;
                facultyBlock?.classList.toggle('d-none', !isInstitution);
                if (facultyInput) {
                    facultyInput.required = isInstitution;
                    if (!isInstitution) facultyInput.value = '';
                }
            };

            studentRadio?.addEventListener('change', syncFacultyVisibility);
            institutionRadio?.addEventListener('change', syncFacultyVisibility);
            syncFacultyVisibility();
        })();
    </script>
}

Views/Account/ResetPassword.cshtml
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Восстановление пароля";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    var token = ViewBag.Token as string;
}

<div class="container fade-in d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 80vh;">
    <div class="custom-card" style="max-width: 500px; width: 100%;">
        <div class="custom-card-header text-center"
             style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);">
            <h4 class="mb-0">
                <i class="fas fa-key me-2"></i>Восстановление пароля
            </h4>
        </div>

        <div class="custom-card-body">
            @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
            {
                <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                </div>
            }

            @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
            {
                <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Success"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                </div>
            }

            <form method="post">
                <input type="hidden" name="token" value="@token" />

                <div class="mb-3">
                    <label class="form-label">
                        <i class="fas fa-lock me-2"></i>Новый пароль
                    </label>
                    <input type="password"
                           name="password"
                           id="password"
                           class="form-control rounded-xl"
                           placeholder="Введите новый пароль"
                           required
                           minlength="12" />
                    <small class="form-text text-muted">
                        Пароль должен быть не короче 12 символов, содержать заглавные и строчные буквы, а также цифры
                    </small>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-3">
                    <label class="form-label">
                        <i class="fas fa-lock me-2"></i>Подтвердите пароль
                    </label>
                    <input type="password"
                           name="confirmPassword"
                           id="confirmPassword"
                           class="form-control rounded-xl"
                           placeholder="Повторите новый пароль"
                           required
                           minlength="12" />
                    <small class="form-text text-muted">
                        Введите пароль еще раз для подтверждения
                    </small>
                </div>

                <div id="passwordMatch" class="mb-3" style="display: none;">
                    <div class="alert alert-warning">
                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
                        <span id="passwordMatchText"></span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <button type="submit"
                        class="btn btn-primary-custom btn-custom w-100 mb-3"
                        id="submitBtn">
                    <i class="fas fa-check me-2"></i>Изменить пароль
                </button>
            </form>

            <div class="text-center">
                <a href="@Url.Action("Login", "Account")" class="btn btn-link">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i>Вернуться к входу
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            const password = document.getElementById('password');
            const confirmPassword = document.getElementById('confirmPassword');
            const passwordMatch = document.getElementById('passwordMatch');
            const passwordMatchText = document.getElementById('passwordMatchText');
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');

            function checkPasswordMatch() {
                if (confirmPassword.value.length === 0) {
                    passwordMatch.style.display = 'none';
                    return;
                }

                if (password.value !== confirmPassword.value) {
                    passwordMatch.style.display = 'block';
                    passwordMatchText.textContent = 'Пароли не совпадают';
                    passwordMatch.className = 'mb-3 alert alert-danger';
                    submitBtn.disabled = true;
                } else {
                    passwordMatch.style.display = 'none';
                    submitBtn.disabled = false;
                }
            }

            password.addEventListener('input', checkPasswordMatch);
            confirmPassword.addEventListener('input', checkPasswordMatch);
        });
    </script>
}

@section Styles {
    <style>
        .custom-card {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .custom-card-header {
            padding: 1.5rem;
            color: white;
        }

        .custom-card-body {
            padding: 2rem;
            background: white;
        }

        .form-label {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--primary-dark);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .form-control.rounded-xl {
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 2px solid var(--primary-light);
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .form-control.rounded-xl:focus {
            border-color: var(--primary-medium);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.25);
        }

        .btn-primary-custom {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border: none;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .btn-primary-custom:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
        }

        .btn-primary-custom:disabled {
            opacity: 0.6;
            cursor: not-allowed;
            transform: none;
        }

        .btn-link {
            color: var(--primary-medium);
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .btn-link:hover {
            color: var(--primary-dark);
        }
    </style>
}


Views/Account/VerifyTwoFactor.cshtml
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Подтверждение входа";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 80vh;">
    <div class="custom-card" style="max-width: 420px; width: 100%;">
        <div class="custom-card-header text-center"
             style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);">
            <h4 class="mb-0">
                <i class="fas fa-shield-alt me-2"></i>Двухфакторная аутентификация
            </h4>
        </div>

        <div class="custom-card-body">
            @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
            {
                <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show mb-3" role="alert">
                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                </div>
            }

            <div class="alert alert-info mb-3">
                <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
                Код подтверждения отправлен на вашу почту. Проверьте письмо и введите код ниже.
            </div>

            @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                <div class="alert alert-danger mb-3">
                    @foreach (var error in ViewData.ModelState.Values.SelectMany(v => v.Errors))
                    {
                        <div>
                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@error.ErrorMessage
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }

            <form method="post" id="verifyForm">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="form-label fw-bold mb-3">Введите код подтверждения</label>
                    <div class="code-input-container">
                        <input type="text"
                               name="code"
                               id="codeInput"
                               class="form-control rounded-xl text-center"
                               placeholder="000000"
                               maxlength="6"
                               pattern="[0-9]{6}"
                               style="font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: 12px; font-weight: bold; padding: 20px; border: 3px solid #667eea;"
                               required
                               autofocus
                               autocomplete="off" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-text mt-3 text-center">
                        <i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i>Код действителен в течение 20 минут
                    </div>
                </div>

                <button type="submit"
                        class="btn btn-primary-custom btn-custom w-100 mb-3"
                        style="padding: 12px; font-size: 18px;">
                    <i class="fas fa-check me-2"></i>Подтвердить вход
                </button>
            </form>

            <div class="text-center">
                <a href="@Url.Action("Login", "Account")" class="btn btn-link">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i>Вернуться к входу
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const codeInput = document.getElementById('codeInput');
            codeInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
                this.value = this.value.replace(/\D/g, '').substring(0, 6);
                if (this.value.length === 6) {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        document.getElementById('verifyForm').submit();
                    }, 300);
                }
            });
            codeInput.focus();
            codeInput.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.select();
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Styles {
    <style>
        .code-input-container {
            position: relative;
        }
        
        #codeInput:focus {
            border-color: #667eea !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.25) !important;
            outline: none;
        }
        
        .custom-card {
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-out;
        }
        
        @@keyframes slideIn {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-20px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }
    </style>
}

Views/Admin/AuditLog.cshtml
﻿@model List<LibraryMPT.Models.AuditLog>

@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Журнал аудита";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    string? actionType = ViewBag.ActionType as string;
    string? search = ViewBag.Search as string;
    string sortBy = ViewBag.SortBy as string ?? "date";
    string sortDir = ViewBag.SortDir as string ?? "desc";
    var model = Model ?? new List<AuditLog>();
}

<div class="container fade-in">

<style>
    .audit-data {
        background: #f8f9fa;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 14px;
        font-family: Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: 14px;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        max-height: 60vh;
        overflow-y: auto;
    }

    .audit-label {
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: #6c757d;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
</style>

    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="mb-0">
            <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Журнал аудита
        </h2>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Error"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Success"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3">
    <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i> Назад к панели
    </a>
    
    <form asp-action="ClearAuditLogs" method="post"
          onsubmit="return confirm('Вы уверены, что хотите удалить ВСЕ логи?');">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <button class="btn btn-danger">
            <i class="fas fa-trash me-1"></i> Очистить все логи
        </button>
    </form>
</div>

<div class="card mb-4">
    <div class="card-body">
        <form method="get" class="row g-3 align-items-end">
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <label class="form-label">Поиск</label>
                <input type="text"
                       name="search"
                       class="form-control"
                       value="@search"
                       placeholder="Таблица, действие, пользователь..." />
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <label class="form-label">Тип действия</label>
                <select name="actionType" class="form-select">
                    <option value="">Все</option>
                    <option value="INSERT" selected="@(actionType == "INSERT")">INSERT</option>
                    <option value="UPDATE" selected="@(actionType == "UPDATE")">UPDATE</option>
                    <option value="DELETE" selected="@(actionType == "DELETE")">DELETE</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <label class="form-label">Сортировка</label>
                <select name="sortBy" class="form-select">
                    <option value="date" selected="@(sortBy == "date")">Дата</option>
                    <option value="table" selected="@(sortBy == "table")">Таблица</option>
                    <option value="action" selected="@(sortBy == "action")">Действие</option>
                    <option value="user" selected="@(sortBy == "user")">Пользователь</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-2">
                <label class="form-label">Направление</label>
                <select name="sortDir" class="form-select">
                    <option value="desc" selected="@(sortDir == "desc")">По убыванию</option>
                    <option value="asc" selected="@(sortDir == "asc")">По возрастанию</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="col-12 d-flex gap-2">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Применить
                </button>
                <a asp-action="AuditLog" class="btn btn-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Сброс
                </a>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
@functions {
    string GetActionClass(string? action)
    {
        return action switch
        {
            "INSERT" => "badge bg-success",
            "UPDATE" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "DELETE" => "badge bg-danger",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }
}

<div class="table-responsive">
    <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
        <thead class="table-light">
            <tr>
                <th>Дата</th>
                <th>Таблица</th>
                <th>Действие</th>
                <th>Пользователь</th>
                <th></th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            @if (!model.Any())
            {
                <tr>
                    <td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted">
                        <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Записи не найдены
                    </td>
                </tr>
            }
            @foreach (var log in model)
            {
                var modalId = $"auditModal_{log.AuditLogID}";
                <tr>
                    <td>@log.AuditDate.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                    <td>@log.TableName</td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="@GetActionClass(log.ActionType)">
                            @log.ActionType
                        </span>
                    </td>
                    <td>@log.UserName</td>
                    <td class="text-end">
                        <button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"
                                data-bs-toggle="modal"
                                data-bs-target="#@modalId">
                            Подробнее
                        </button>
                    </td>
                </tr>

                <div class="modal fade" id="@modalId" tabindex="-1">
                    <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl modal-dialog-centered modal-dialog-scrollable">
                        <div class="modal-content">
                            <div class="modal-header">
                                <h5 class="modal-title">
                                    🛠 @log.ActionType — @log.TableName
                                </h5>
                                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                            </div>

                            <div class="modal-body">
                                <div class="row g-4">
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <div class="audit-label">Старые данные</div>
                                        <div class="audit-data">
                                            @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(log.OldData)
                                                                                    ? "—"
                                                                                    : log.OldData)
                                                                                              </div>
                                                                                          </div>

                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <div class="audit-label">Новые данные</div>
                                        <div class="audit-data">
                                            @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(log.NewData)
                                                                                    ? "—"
                                                                                    : log.NewData)
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                            <div class="modal-footer">
                                <button class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">
                                    Закрыть
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                        }
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
</div>

Views/Admin/CreateStaff.cshtml
@model StaffCreateDto

<h2>Добавить сотрудника</h2>

<form asp-action="CreateStaff" method="post">
    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

    <div class="mb-3">
        <label>Имя</label>
        <input asp-for="FirstName" class="form-control" />
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
        <label>Фамилия</label>
        <input asp-for="LastName" class="form-control" />
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
        <label>Email</label>
        <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" />
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
        <label>Логин</label>
        <input asp-for="Username" class="form-control" />
    </div>

    <div class="alert alert-info">
        <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
        <strong>Пароль будет сгенерирован автоматически</strong> и отправлен на указанный email после создания аккаунта.
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
        <label>Роль</label>
        <select asp-for="RoleID" class="form-select" id="roleSelect">
            @foreach (var r in ViewBag.Roles)
            {
                <option value="@r.RoleID">@r.RoleName</option>
            }
        </select>
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3" id="facultyGroup" style="display: none;">
        <label>Учебное заведение <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
        <select asp-for="FacultyID" class="form-select">
            <option value="">— Выберите учебное заведение —</option>
            @if (ViewBag.Faculties != null)
            {
                @foreach (var faculty in ViewBag.Faculties)
                {
                    <option value="@faculty.FacultyID">@faculty.FacultyName</option>
                }
            }
        </select>
        <small class="form-text text-muted">
            Обязательно для представителя учебного заведения
        </small>
    </div>

    @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger">
            @foreach (var error in ViewData.ModelState.Values.SelectMany(v => v.Errors))
            {
                <div>@error.ErrorMessage</div>
            }
        </div>
    }

    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">
        <i class="fas fa-user-plus me-2" aria-hidden="true"></i>Добавить сотрудника
    </button>
    <a asp-action="UserManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">Назад</a>
</form>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const roleSelect = document.getElementById('roleSelect');
            const facultyGroup = document.getElementById('facultyGroup');
            
            function toggleFacultyField() {
                const selectedRoleText = roleSelect.options[roleSelect.selectedIndex].text;


                if (selectedRoleText === 'InstitutionRepresentative') {
                    facultyGroup.style.display = 'block';
                    facultyGroup.querySelector('select').required = true;
                } else {
                    facultyGroup.style.display = 'none';
                    facultyGroup.querySelector('select').required = false;
                    facultyGroup.querySelector('select').value = '';
                }
            }
            
            roleSelect.addEventListener('change', toggleFacultyField);
            toggleFacultyField(); // Проверяем при загрузке страницы
        });
    </script>
}

Views/Admin/DatabaseBackup.cshtml
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Резервное копирование БД";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    var backupFiles = ViewBag.BackupFiles as List<(string Name, DateTime Date, long Size, string FullPath)> ?? new List<(string, DateTime, long, string)>();
    var backupDir = ViewBag.BackupDir as string ?? "";
}

<div class="container py-4">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="mb-0">
            <i class="fas fa-database text-primary me-2"></i>Резервное копирование базы данных
        </h2>
        <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Назад к панели
        </a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Success"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="row g-4">
        
        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm border-0">
                <div class="card-body text-center py-5">
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus-circle fa-4x text-success"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h4 class="card-title">Создать бэкап</h4>
                    <p class="text-muted mb-4">
                        Создать полную резервную копию базы данных ElectronicLibraryv5
                    </p>
                    <form asp-action="CreateBackup" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg px-4"
                                onclick="this.innerHTML='<i class=\'fas fa-spinner fa-spin me-2\'></i>Создание...'; this.disabled=true; this.form.submit();">
                            <i class="fas fa-save me-2"></i>Создать бэкап
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm border-0">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Информация</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <ul class="list-group list-group-flush">
                        <li class="list-group-item d-flex align-items-start">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-success me-3 mt-1"></i>
                            <div>
                                <strong>Полный бэкап</strong>
                                <p class="mb-0 text-muted small">Включает все таблицы, данные, индексы и хранимые процедуры</p>
                            </div>
                        </li>
                        <li class="list-group-item d-flex align-items-start">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-success me-3 mt-1"></i>
                            <div>
                                <strong>Автоматическое именование</strong>
                                <p class="mb-0 text-muted small">Файлы сохраняются с датой и временем создания</p>
                            </div>
                        </li>
                        <li class="list-group-item d-flex align-items-start">
                            <i class="fas fa-folder text-primary me-3 mt-1"></i>
                            <div>
                                <strong>Папка бэкапов</strong>
                                <p class="mb-0 text-muted small"><code>@backupDir</code></p>
                            </div>
                        </li>
                        <li class="list-group-item d-flex align-items-start">
                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-warning me-3 mt-1"></i>
                            <div>
                                <strong>Восстановление</strong>
                                <p class="mb-0 text-muted small">При восстановлении все текущие данные будут заменены данными из бэкапа</p>
                            </div>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    
    <div class="card mt-4 shadow-sm border-0">
        <div class="card-header bg-dark text-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-list me-2"></i>Существующие бэкапы</h5>
            <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">@backupFiles.Count файл(ов)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            @if (backupFiles.Any())
            {
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-hover mb-0">
                        <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th><i class="fas fa-file-archive me-2"></i>Имя файла</th>
                                <th><i class="fas fa-calendar me-2"></i>Дата создания</th>
                                <th><i class="fas fa-weight me-2"></i>Размер</th>
                                <th class="text-end">Действия</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var file in backupFiles)
                            {
                                var sizeInMb = file.Size / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
                                <tr>
                                    <td>
                                        <i class="fas fa-database text-primary me-2"></i>
                                        <code>@file.Name</code>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>@file.Date.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm:ss")</td>
                                    <td>@sizeInMb.ToString("F2") МБ</td>
                                    <td class="text-end">
                                        <div class="btn-group">
                                            <a asp-action="DownloadBackup" asp-route-fileName="@file.Name" 
                                               class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" title="Скачать">
                                                <i class="fas fa-download"></i>
                                            </a>
                                            <form asp-action="RestoreBackup" method="post" class="d-inline"
                                                  onsubmit="return confirm('⚠️ ВНИМАНИЕ!\n\nВосстановление из бэкапа заменит ВСЕ текущие данные!\n\nПродолжить?');">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="fileName" value="@file.Name" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-warning btn-sm" title="Восстановить">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-undo"></i>
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                            <form asp-action="DeleteBackup" method="post" class="d-inline"
                                                  onsubmit="return confirm('Удалить этот бэкап?');">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="fileName" value="@file.Name" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm" title="Удалить">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="text-center py-5">
                    <i class="fas fa-folder-open fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                    <h5 class="text-muted">Бэкапы не найдены</h5>
                    <p class="text-muted">Создайте первый бэкап базы данных</p>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>


Views/Admin/DeleteFaculty.cshtml
@model Faculty
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Удалить учебное заведение";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="custom-card">
                <div class="custom-card-header bg-danger text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>Удаление учебного заведения
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    <p class="text-danger">
                        Вы уверены, что хотите удалить это учебное заведение?
                    </p>

                    <dl class="row">
                        <dt class="col-sm-4">Название:</dt>
                        <dd class="col-sm-8"><strong>@Model.FacultyName</strong></dd>
                    </dl>

                    <div class="alert alert-warning">
                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
                        <strong>Внимание:</strong> Удаление учебного заведения может повлиять на пользователей,
                        у которых оно указано. Их поле "Учебное заведение" будет очищено.
                    </div>

                    <form asp-action="DeleteFaculty" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FacultyID" />

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                            <a asp-action="FacultyManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">
                                Отмена
                            </a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">
                                <i class="fas fa-trash me-1"></i> Удалить
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>


Views/Admin/DeleteRole.cshtml
@model Role
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Удалить роль";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="custom-card">
                <div class="custom-card-header bg-danger text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>Удаление роли
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    <p class="text-danger">
                        Вы уверены, что хотите удалить эту роль?
                    </p>

                    <dl class="row">
                        <dt class="col-sm-4">Название:</dt>
                        <dd class="col-sm-8"><strong>@Model.RoleName</strong></dd>
                    </dl>

                    @if (ViewBag.UsersCount > 0)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-danger">
                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
                            <strong>Внимание!</strong> Эта роль используется <strong>@ViewBag.UsersCount</strong> пользователем(ями).
                            Невозможно удалить роль, пока она назначена пользователям.
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-warning">
                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
                            <strong>Внимание:</strong> Удаление роли необратимо.
                        </div>
                    }

                    <form asp-action="DeleteRole" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="RoleID" />

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                            <a asp-action="RoleManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">
                                Отмена
                            </a>
                            @if (ViewBag.UsersCount == 0)
                            {
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">
                                    <i class="fas fa-trash me-1"></i> Удалить
                                </button>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger" disabled>
                                    <i class="fas fa-ban me-1"></i> Невозможно удалить
                                </button>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>


Views/Admin/EditFaculty.cshtml
@model Faculty
@{

    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">

                        <i class="fas fa-edit me-2"></i>Редактировать учебное заведение
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-danger">
                            @foreach (var error in ViewData.ModelState.Values.SelectMany(v => v.Errors))
                            {
                                <div>@error.ErrorMessage</div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    }

                    <form asp-action="EditFaculty" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FacultyID" />

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Название учебного заведения</label>
                            <input asp-for="FacultyName" class="form-control" required />
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">

                                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i> Назад
                            </a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-warning">
                                <i class="fas fa-save me-1"></i> Сохранить
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

Views/Admin/EditUser.cshtml
@model LibraryMPT.Models.UserAdminDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Редактирование пользователя";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="custom-card">
                <div class="custom-card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-edit me-2"></i>Редактирование пользователя
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Success"]
                            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
                            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (ViewBag.DecryptedLastName != null)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-info mb-3">
                            <strong>Расшифрованная фамилия:</strong> @ViewBag.DecryptedLastName
                            <br />
                            <small class="text-muted">Демонстрация работы шифрования данных</small>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-danger">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>Ошибки валидации:</h6>
                            <ul class="mb-0">
                                @foreach (var error in ViewData.ModelState.Values.SelectMany(v => v.Errors))
                                {
                                    <li>@error.ErrorMessage</li>
                                }
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <form asp-action="EditUser" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="UserID" />

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Email</label>
                            <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" required />
                            <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Роль</label>
                            <select asp-for="RoleID" class="form-select">
                                @if (ViewBag.Roles != null)
                                {
                                    @foreach (var r in ViewBag.Roles)
                                    {
                                        @if (r.RoleID == Model.RoleID)
                                        {
                                            <option value="@r.RoleID" selected>@r.RoleName</option>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <option value="@r.RoleID">@r.RoleName</option>
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        @if (ViewBag.CanEditFaculty != false)
                        {
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Учебное заведение</label>
                                <select asp-for="FacultyID" class="form-select">
                                    <option value="">— не выбран —</option>
                                    @if (ViewBag.Faculties != null)
                                    {
                                        @foreach (var f in ViewBag.Faculties)
                                        {
                                            @if (Model.FacultyID.HasValue && f.FacultyID == Model.FacultyID.Value)
                                            {
                                                <option value="@f.FacultyID" selected>@f.FacultyName</option>
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                <option value="@f.FacultyID">@f.FacultyName</option>
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                </select>
                                <small class="form-text text-muted">
                                    Назначение учебного заведения необходимо для доступа к подпискам
                                </small>
                            </div>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Учебное заведение</label>
                                <input type="text" class="form-control" value="@(Model.FacultyName ?? "— не назначен —")" disabled />
                                <small class="form-text text-muted">
                                    Администраторы и библиотекари не могут иметь учебное заведение
                                </small>
                            </div>
                        }

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                            <a asp-action="UserManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">
                                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i> Назад
                            </a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">
                                <i class="fas fa-save me-1"></i> Сохранить
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

Views/Admin/FacultyManagement.cshtml
@model List<Faculty>
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Управление учебными заведениями";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="mb-0">
            <i class="fas fa-graduation-cap me-2"></i>Управление учебными заведениями
        </h2>
        <a asp-action="AddFaculty" class="btn btn-success">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Добавить учебное заведение
        </a>
    </div>

    
    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-body">
            <form method="get" class="row g-3">
                <div class="col-md-10">
                    <label class="form-label">Поиск по названию</label>
                    <input type="text" name="search" class="form-control" 
                           value="@ViewBag.Search" placeholder="Введите название учебного заведения...">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2 d-flex align-items-end gap-2">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Поиск
                    </button>
                    <a asp-action="FacultyManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Сброс
                    </a>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Success"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="alert alert-info">
            <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
            Учебные заведения отсутствуют. Создайте первое учебное заведение.
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead class="table-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th>Название учебного заведения</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Действия</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var f in Model)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <strong class="text-primary">@f.FacultyName</strong>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <a asp-action="EditFaculty"
                                   asp-route-id="@f.FacultyID"
                                   class="btn btn-sm btn-warning me-2">
                                    <i class="fas fa-pen-to-square"></i>
                                </a>
                                <a asp-action="DeleteFaculty"
                                   asp-route-id="@f.FacultyID"
                                   class="btn btn-sm btn-danger"
                                   onclick="return confirm('Удалить учебное заведение? Это может повлиять на пользователей, у которых оно указано.')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                </a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    }
</div>


Views/Admin/Index.cshtml
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Панель администратора";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    int totalUsers = ViewBag.TotalUsers as int? ?? 0;
    int adminCount = ViewBag.AdminCount as int? ?? 0;
    int librarianCount = ViewBag.LibrarianCount as int? ?? 0;
    int readerCount = ViewBag.ReaderCount as int? ?? 0;
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-start align-items-md-center mb-5">
        <div class="mb-4 mb-md-0">
            <h1 class="mb-2">
                <i class="fas fa-user-shield me-3"></i>Панель администратора
            </h1>
            <p class="lead text-muted">Полный контроль над системой и пользователями</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Home")" class="btn btn-light-custom btn-custom">
                <i class="fas fa-home"></i> На главную
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="alert alert-warning-custom alert-custom mb-5">
        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle fa-2x"></i>
        <div>
            <h5 class="alert-heading mb-2">🔐 Административный доступ</h5>

Views/Admin/RoleAssignment.cshtml
@model List<LibraryMPT.Models.UserAdminDto>
@using LibraryMPT.Models
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Управление ролями";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    var roles = ViewBag.Roles as List<Role> ?? new List<Role>();
    int? currentUserId = ViewBag.CurrentUserId as int?;
    var model = Model ?? new List<UserAdminDto>();
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="mb-0">
            <i class="fas fa-user-tag me-2"></i>Управление ролями пользователей
        </h2>
        <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i> Назад
        </a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Error"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Success"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

<table class="table table-striped align-middle">
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th>Email</th>
            <th>Текущая роль</th>
            <th>Учебное заведение</th>
            <th style="width: 250px;">Новая роль</th>
            <th></th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        @if (!model.Any())
        {
            <tr>
                <td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted">
                    <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Пользователи не найдены
                </td>
            </tr>
        }
        @foreach (var u in model)
        {
            var isCurrentUser = currentUserId.HasValue && u.UserID == currentUserId.Value;
            <tr>
                <td>@u.Email</td>
                <td>@u.RoleName</td>
                <td>@(u.FacultyName ?? "—")</td>

                <td>
                    @if (isCurrentUser)
                    {
                        <span class="text-muted">— нельзя изменить свою роль</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <form asp-action="UpdateUserRole" method="post" class="d-flex gap-2">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                            <input type="hidden" name="userId" value="@u.UserID" />

                            <select name="roleId" class="form-select form-select-sm">
                                @foreach (var role in roles)
                                {
                                    if (role.RoleID == u.RoleID)
                                    {
                                        <option value="@role.RoleID" selected="selected">@role.RoleName</option>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <option value="@role.RoleID">@role.RoleName</option>
                                    }
                                }
                            </select>

                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
                                💾
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    }
                </td>


                <td></td>
            </tr>
        }
    </tbody>
</table>
</div>

Views/Admin/RoleManagement.cshtml
@model List<Role>
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Управление ролями";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="mb-0">
            <i class="fas fa-user-tag me-2"></i>Управление ролями
        </h2>
        <a asp-action="AddRole" class="btn btn-success">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Добавить роль
        </a>
    </div>

    
    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-body">
            <form method="get" class="row g-3">
                <div class="col-md-10">
                    <label class="form-label">Поиск по названию</label>
                    <input type="text" name="search" class="form-control" 
                           value="@ViewBag.Search" placeholder="Введите название роли...">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2 d-flex align-items-end gap-2">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Поиск
                    </button>
                    <a asp-action="RoleManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Сброс
                    </a>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Success"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["Error"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="alert alert-info">
            <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
            Роли отсутствуют. Создайте первую роль.
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead class="table-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th>Название роли</th>
                        <th class="text-end">Действия</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var r in Model)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <strong class="text-primary">@r.RoleName</strong>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                <a asp-action="EditRole"
                                   asp-route-id="@r.RoleID"
                                   class="btn btn-sm btn-warning me-2">
                                    <i class="fas fa-pen-to-square"></i>
                                </a>
                                <a asp-action="DeleteRole"
                                   asp-route-id="@r.RoleID"
                                   class="btn btn-sm btn-danger"
                                   onclick="return confirm('Удалить роль? Это может повлиять на пользователей с этой ролью.')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                </a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    }
</div>


Views/Admin/SecurityDashboard.cshtml
﻿@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Мониторинг безопасности и производительности";
    Layout = "_Layout";

    int totalUsers = ViewBag.TotalUsers as int? ?? 0;
    int totalBooks = ViewBag.TotalBooks as int? ?? 0;
    int downloads24h = ViewBag.DownloadsLast24h as int? ?? 0;
    int reads24h = ViewBag.ReadsLast24h as int? ?? 0;
    int audit24h = ViewBag.AuditEventsLast24h as int? ?? 0;
    int blockedUsers = ViewBag.BlockedUsers as int? ?? 0;
    int twoFactorUsers = ViewBag.TwoFactorUsers as int? ?? 0;
    int twoFactorStudents = ViewBag.TwoFactorStudents as int? ?? 0;
    int activeSubscriptions = ViewBag.ActiveSubscriptions as int? ?? 0;
    int pendingSubscriptions = ViewBag.PendingSubscriptions as int? ?? 0;
    int booksRequiringSub = ViewBag.BooksRequiringSubscription as int? ?? 0;
    int dbSizeMb = ViewBag.DbSizeMb as int? ?? 0;
    var lastAudit = ViewBag.LastAudit as IEnumerable<LibraryMPT.Models.AuditLog> ?? Enumerable.Empty<LibraryMPT.Models.AuditLog>();
    var popularAudit = ViewBag.AuditPopular as IEnumerable<LibraryMPT.Models.AuditSummaryDto> ?? Enumerable.Empty<LibraryMPT.Models.AuditSummaryDto>();
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    @if (ViewBag.DashboardError != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-warning alert-dismissible fade show mb-4" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>@ViewBag.DashboardError
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Закрыть"></button>
        </div>
    }
    <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-start align-items-md-center mb-4">
        <div class="mb-3 mb-md-0">
            <h1 class="mb-2">
