                <i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt me-3"></i>Мониторинг безопасности и производительности
            </h1>
            <p class="lead text-muted mb-1">
                Быстрый обзор состояния системы, активности пользователей и базовых метрик производительности
            </p>
            <p class="text-muted small mb-0">
                Клиентские тесты времени ответа выполняются из браузера администратора и полезны для отладки в Dev.
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Admin")" class="btn btn-light-custom btn-custom">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i>Назад в панель администратора
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-users fa-2x mb-2 text-primary-medium"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@totalUsers</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Пользователей</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-book fa-2x mb-2 text-primary-medium"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@totalBooks</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Книг в системе</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-download fa-2x mb-2 text-success"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@downloads24h</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Загрузок за 24 часа</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-book-reader fa-2x mb-2 text-warning"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@reads24h</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Чтений за 24 часа</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-user-lock fa-2x mb-2 text-danger"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@blockedUsers</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Заблокированных пользователей</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-shield-alt fa-2x mb-2 text-success"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@twoFactorUsers</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Пользователей с 2FA</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-user-graduate fa-2x mb-2 text-success"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@twoFactorStudents</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Студентов с 2FA</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-database fa-2x mb-2 text-primary-medium"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@dbSizeMb МБ</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Размер базы данных</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4 mb-4">
        <div class="col-lg-6">
            <div class="custom-card h-100">
                <div class="custom-card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-stopwatch me-2"></i>Тест времени ответа страниц
                    </h5>
                    <button id="runPingTestsBtn" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary-custom">
                        <i class="fas fa-play me-1"></i>Запустить тесты
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    <p class="text-muted small">
                        Тест выполняет несколько запросов с клиента к ключевым страницам и считает среднее время ответа.
                        Это полезно для локальной диагностики и проверки после изменений.
                    </p>

                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-sm align-middle mb-0" id="pingResultsTable">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Эндпоинт</th>
                                    <th class="text-center">Попыток</th>
                                    <th class="text-center">Среднее, мс</th>
                                    <th class="text-center">Мин, мс</th>
                                    <th class="text-center">Макс, мс</th>
                                    <th class="text-center">Статус</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="6" class="text-muted text-center py-3">
                                        Нажмите «Запустить тесты», чтобы измерить время ответа.
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-lg-6">
            <div class="custom-card h-100">
                <div class="custom-card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Последние события аудита (10)
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    @if (!lastAudit.Any())
                    {
                        <p class="text-muted mb-0">События аудита за последние 24 часа отсутствуют.</p>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-sm align-middle mb-0">
                                <thead>
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Дата</th>
                                        <th>Таблица</th>
                                        <th>Действие</th>
                                        <th>Пользователь</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var log in lastAudit)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td class="text-nowrap">@log.AuditDate.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm:ss")</td>
                                            <td>@log.TableName</td>
                                            <td>
                                                <span class="badge bg-secondary">@log.ActionType</span>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>@log.UserName</td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mt-3 text-end">
                            <a href="@Url.Action("AuditLog", "Admin")" class="btn btn-link btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>Открыть полный журнал
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4 mb-4">
        <div class="col-lg-6">
            <div class="custom-card h-100">
                <div class="custom-card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-bar me-2"></i>Популярные действия / страницы (24 часа)
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    @if (!popularAudit.Any())
                    {
                        <p class="text-muted mb-0">За последние 24 часа нет данных по действиям в журнале аудита.</p>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-sm align-middle mb-0">
                                <thead>
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Таблица / область</th>
                                        <th>Действие</th>
                                        <th class="text-end">Событий</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var item in popularAudit)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>@(string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.TableName) ? "(нет данных)" : item.TableName)</td>
                                            <td>@(string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.ActionType) ? "(нет данных)" : item.ActionType)</td>
                                            <td class="text-end">
                                                <span class="badge bg-primary">@item.EventsCount</span>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-lg-6">
            <div class="custom-card h-100">
                <div class="custom-card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-server me-2"></i>Живые серверные метрики
                    </h5>
                    <span id="runtimeStatus" class="small text-muted">обновление...</span>
                </div>
                <div class="custom-card-body">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-sm align-middle mb-2">
                            <tbody>
                                <tr>
                                    <th style="width: 40%;">Время сервера (МСК)</th>
                                    <td id="metricServerTime" class="text-muted">—</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Память процесса (Working Set)</th>
                                    <td id="metricWorkingSet" class="text-muted">—</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Память GC (TotalMemory)</th>
                                    <td id="metricGcMemory" class="text-muted">—</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>PID процесса</th>
                                    <td id="metricPid" class="text-muted">—</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Время отправки последнего email</th>
                                    <td id="metricEmailTime" class="text-muted">—</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Последняя ошибка email</th>
                                    <td id="metricEmailError" class="text-muted small">—</td>
                                </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <p class="small text-muted mb-0">
                        Обновление каждые 5 секунд. Эти значения полезны для отладки и базового мониторинга,
                        но не заменяют полноценные системы APM/логирования.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="custom-card mb-4">
        <div class="custom-card-header">
            <h5 class="mb-0">
                <i class="fas fa-vial me-2"></i>Быстрые тесты безопасности
            </h5>
        </div>
        <div class="custom-card-body">
            <p class="text-muted small mb-3">
                Для детальных тестов используйте отдельную страницу
                <strong>«Панель тестов безопасности (Dev)»</strong> из основной панели администратора.
                Ниже — быстрые проверки доступности и базовых заголовков.
            </p>

            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3">
                <button id="quickSecurityTestBtn" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">
                    <i class="fas fa-shield-alt me-1"></i>Проверить заголовки /Home/Index
                </button>
                <span id="quickSecurityStatus" class="small text-muted"></span>
            </div>

            <pre id="quickSecurityDetails" class="bg-light p-2 small rounded mb-0" style="max-height: 200px; overflow:auto;"></pre>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            const endpoints = [
                { name: "Главная страница", path: "@Url.Content("~/Home/Index")" },
                { name: "Каталог книг", path: "@Url.Content("~/Books/Index")" },
                { name: "Каталог (клиент)", path: "@Url.Content("~/Client/Index")" },
                { name: "Прочитанные книги", path: "@Url.Content("~/Client/Readed")" },
                { name: "Вход", path: "@Url.Content("~/Account/Login")" },
                { name: "Панель администратора", path: "@Url.Content("~/Admin/Index")" },
                { name: "Панель мониторинга", path: "@Url.Content("~/Admin/SecurityDashboard")" },
                { name: "Панель подписок", path: "@Url.Content("~/Subscription/Index")" }
            ];

            async function pingEndpoint(url, attempts = 3) {
                const results = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < attempts; i++) {
                    const start = performance.now();
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch(url, { method: "GET", cache: "no-cache" });
                        const end = performance.now();
                        results.push({ ok: response.ok, status: response.status, duration: end - start });
                    } catch (e) {
                        const end = performance.now();
                        results.push({ ok: false, status: 0, duration: end - start, error: e.message });
                    }
                }
                return results;
            }

            function calcStats(measures) {
                if (!measures.length) return null;
                const durations = measures.map(m => m.duration);
                const avg = durations.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / durations.length;
                const min = Math.min(...durations);
                const max = Math.max(...durations);
                const okCount = measures.filter(m => m.ok).length;
                const allOk = okCount === measures.length;
                return { avg, min, max, allOk, okCount, total: measures.length, lastStatus: measures[measures.length - 1].status };
            }

            function renderPingRow(tbody, endpointName, url, stats) {
                const tr = document.createElement("tr");
                tr.innerHTML = `
                    <td>
                        <div class="fw-semibold">${endpointName}</div>
                        <div class="small text-muted">${url}</div>
                    </td>
                    <td class="text-center">${stats.total}</td>
                    <td class="text-center">${stats.avg.toFixed(1)}</td>
                    <td class="text-center">${stats.min.toFixed(1)}</td>
                    <td class="text-center">${stats.max.toFixed(1)}</td>
                    <td class="text-center">
                        <span class="badge ${stats.allOk ? "bg-success" : "bg-warning"}">
                            ${stats.allOk ? "OK" : "Проблемы"} (HTTP ${stats.lastStatus || "n/a"})
                        </span>
                    </td>
                `;
                tbody.appendChild(tr);
            }

            async function runPingTests() {
                const table = document.getElementById("pingResultsTable");
                const tbody = table.querySelector("tbody");
                tbody.innerHTML = `
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="6" class="text-muted text-center py-3">
                            Выполняются тесты, подождите...
                        </td>
                    </tr>`;

                const baseUrl = window.location.origin;
                const results = [];

                for (const ep of endpoints) {
                    const url = ep.path.startsWith("http") ? ep.path : (baseUrl + ep.path);
                    const measures = await pingEndpoint(url, 3);
                    const stats = calcStats(measures);
                    if (stats) {
                        results.push({ endpoint: ep, url, stats });
                    }
                }

                tbody.innerHTML = "";
                if (!results.length) {
                    tbody.innerHTML = `
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="6" class="text-muted text-center py-3">
                                Не удалось выполнить тесты.
                            </td>
                        </tr>`;
                    return;
                }

                for (const r of results) {
                    renderPingRow(tbody, r.endpoint.name, r.url, r.stats);
                }
            }

            async function runQuickSecurityTest() {
                const statusEl = document.getElementById("quickSecurityStatus");
                const detailsEl = document.getElementById("quickSecurityDetails");
                statusEl.textContent = "Выполняется запрос...";
                detailsEl.textContent = "";

                const url = "@Url.Content("~/Home/Index")";
                try {
                    const response = await fetch(url, { method: "GET", cache: "no-cache" });
                    statusEl.textContent = `HTTP ${response.status} ${response.ok ? "(OK)" : "(ошибка)"}`;

                    const csp = response.headers.get("Content-Security-Policy");
                    const xfo = response.headers.get("X-Frame-Options");
                    const xcto = response.headers.get("X-Content-Type-Options");
                    const xxss = response.headers.get("X-XSS-Protection");
                    const referrer = response.headers.get("Referrer-Policy");

                    const lines = [];
                    lines.push(`URL: ${url}`);
                    lines.push(`Status: ${response.status}`);
                    lines.push("");
                    lines.push("Security headers:");
                    lines.push(`Content-Security-Policy: ${csp || "(нет)"}`);
                    lines.push(`X-Frame-Options: ${xfo || "(нет)"}`);
                    lines.push(`X-Content-Type-Options: ${xcto || "(нет)"}`);
                    lines.push(`X-XSS-Protection: ${xxss || "(нет)"}`);
                    lines.push(`Referrer-Policy: ${referrer || "(нет)"}`);

                    detailsEl.textContent = lines.join("\n");
                } catch (e) {
                    statusEl.textContent = "Ошибка при выполнении запроса";
                    detailsEl.textContent = `Ошибка: ${e.message || e}`;
                }
            }

            document.getElementById("runPingTestsBtn")?.addEventListener("click", runPingTests);
            document.getElementById("quickSecurityTestBtn")?.addEventListener("click", runQuickSecurityTest);

            async function updateRuntimeMetrics() {
                const statusEl = document.getElementById("runtimeStatus");
                const elServerTime = document.getElementById("metricServerTime");
                const elWs = document.getElementById("metricWorkingSet");
                const elGc = document.getElementById("metricGcMemory");
                const elPid = document.getElementById("metricPid");
                const elEmailTime = document.getElementById("metricEmailTime");
                const elEmailError = document.getElementById("metricEmailError");

                try {
                    const response = await fetch("@Url.Action("RuntimeMetrics", "Admin")", { cache: "no-cache" });
                    if (!response.ok) {
                        statusEl.textContent = "ошибка HTTP " + response.status;
                        return;
                    }
                    const data = await response.json();

                    statusEl.textContent = "обновлено";
                    let serverTimeMsk = "—";
                    if (data.serverTimeUtc) {
                        const utcDate = new Date(data.serverTimeUtc);
                        try {
                            serverTimeMsk = utcDate.toLocaleString("ru-RU", {
                                timeZone: "Europe/Moscow",
                                hour12: false
                            });
                        } catch {
                            const mskMs = utcDate.getTime() + 3 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
                            const mskDate = new Date(mskMs);
                            const yyyy = mskDate.getFullYear();
                            const mm = String(mskDate.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
                            const dd = String(mskDate.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
                            const hh = String(mskDate.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
                            const mi = String(mskDate.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
                            const ss = String(mskDate.getSeconds()).padStart(2, "0");
                            serverTimeMsk = `${dd}.${mm}.${yyyy} ${hh}:${mi}:${ss}`;
                        }
                    }
                    elServerTime.textContent = serverTimeMsk;

                    function formatBytes(bytes) {
                        if (!bytes || bytes <= 0) return "0 Б";
                        const units = ["Б", "КБ", "МБ", "ГБ"];
                        let i = 0;
                        let value = bytes;
                        while (value >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) {
                            value /= 1024;
                            i++;
                        }
                        return value.toFixed(1) + " " + units[i];
                    }

                    elWs.textContent = formatBytes(data.workingSetBytes || 0);
                    elGc.textContent = formatBytes(data.gcTotalMemoryBytes || 0);
                    elPid.textContent = data.processId || "—";

                    if (data.emailLastDurationMs && data.emailLastSendUtc) {
                        const emailTime = new Date(data.emailLastSendUtc).toISOString().replace("T", " ").replace("Z", "");
                        elEmailTime.textContent = `${data.emailLastDurationMs} мс (отправлено: ${emailTime})`;
                    } else {
                        elEmailTime.textContent = "данных пока нет";
                    }

                    elEmailError.textContent = data.emailLastError || "—";
                } catch (e) {
                    statusEl.textContent = "ошибка связи";
                }
            }
            updateRuntimeMetrics();
            setInterval(updateRuntimeMetrics, 5000);
        })();
    </script>
}

@section Styles {
    <style>
        .stat-card {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 1.4rem 1.2rem;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
        }

        .stat-number {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .stat-label {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: #6c757d;
        }
    </style>
}



Views/Admin/UserManagement.cshtml
@model List<LibraryMPT.Models.UserAdminDto>
@using LibraryMPT.Models
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Управление пользователями";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    var roles = ViewBag.Roles as List<Role> ?? new List<Role>();
    var faculties = ViewBag.Faculties as List<Faculty> ?? new List<Faculty>();
    string? roleFilter = ViewBag.RoleFilter as string;
    string? facultyFilter = ViewBag.FacultyFilter as string;
    string? statusFilter = ViewBag.StatusFilter as string;
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="mb-0">
            <i class="fas fa-users-cog me-2"></i>Управление пользователями
        </h2>
        <a asp-action="CreateStaff" asp-controller="Admin" class="btn btn-success">
            <i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> Добавить сотрудника
        </a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Success"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Закрыть"></button>
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["Warning"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-warning alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>@TempData["Warning"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Закрыть"></button>
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-times-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Закрыть"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-body">
            <form method="get" class="row g-3">
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <label class="form-label">Поиск по email</label>
                    <input type="text" name="search" class="form-control" 
                           value="@ViewBag.Search" placeholder="Введите email...">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Роль</label>
                    <select name="roleFilter" class="form-select">
                        <option value="">Все роли</option>
                        @foreach (var role in roles)
                        {
                            if (roleFilter == role.RoleName)
                            {
                                <option value="@role.RoleName" selected="selected">@role.RoleName</option>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <option value="@role.RoleName">@role.RoleName</option>
                            }
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Факультет</label>
                    <select name="facultyFilter" class="form-select">
                        <option value="">Все факультеты</option>
                        @foreach (var faculty in faculties)
                        {
                            if (facultyFilter == faculty.FacultyName)
                            {
                                <option value="@faculty.FacultyName" selected="selected">@faculty.FacultyName</option>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <option value="@faculty.FacultyName">@faculty.FacultyName</option>
                            }
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Статус</label>
                    <select name="statusFilter" class="form-select">
                        <option value="">Все</option>
                        @if (statusFilter == "active")
                        {
                            <option value="active" selected="selected">Активные</option>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <option value="active">Активные</option>
                        }
                        @if (statusFilter == "blocked")
                        {
                            <option value="blocked" selected="selected">Заблокированные</option>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <option value="blocked">Заблокированные</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-3 d-flex align-items-end gap-2">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Поиск
                    </button>
                    <a asp-action="UserManagement" class="btn btn-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Сброс
                    </a>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="table-responsive">
        <table class="table table-hover align-middle">

    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th>Email</th>
            <th>Роль</th>
            <th>Факультет</th>
            <th>Статус</th>
            <th>Фамилия (расшифрованная)</th>
            <th class="text-end"></th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        @foreach (var u in Model)
        {
            <tr>
                <td>@u.Email</td>

                <td>
                    <span class="badge
                            @(u.RoleName == "Admin" ? "bg-danger" :
                                                    u.RoleName == "Librarian" ? "bg-primary" : "bg-success")">
                    @u.RoleName
                </span>
            </td>

                <td>
                    @(string.IsNullOrEmpty(u.FacultyName) ? "—" : u.FacultyName)
                </td>

                <td>
                    @if (u.IsBlocked)
                    {
                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">Заблокирован</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="badge bg-success">Активен</span>
                    }
                </td>

                <td>
                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-info decrypt-btn" 
                            data-user-id="@u.UserID"
                            title="Расшифровать фамилию">
                        <i class="fas fa-key"></i> Расшифровать
                    </button>
                    <span class="decrypted-name-@u.UserID ms-2"></span>
                </td>

                <td class="text-end d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                    <a asp-action="EditUser"
                       asp-route-id="@u.UserID"
                       class="btn btn-sm btn-warning"
                       title="Редактировать">
                        <i class="fas fa-pen-to-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </a>

                @if (u.RoleName != "Admin")
                    {
                        <form asp-action="ToggleBlock"
                              method="post"
                              onsubmit="return confirm('@(u.IsBlocked ? "Разблокировать пользователя?" : "Заблокировать пользователя?")');">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@u.UserID" />
                            @if (u.IsBlocked)
                            {
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-success">
                                    <i class="fas fa-unlock"></i>
                                </button>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger">
                                    <i class="fas fa-ban"></i>
                                </button>
                            }
                        </form>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="text-muted">—</span>
                    }
                </td>
            </tr>
        }
    </tbody>
</table>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.querySelectorAll('.decrypt-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', async function() {
                const userId = this.dataset.userId;
                const span = document.querySelector(`.decrypted-name-${userId}`);
                
                if (span.textContent) {
                    span.textContent = '';
                    this.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-key"></i> Расшифровать';
                    return;
                }
                
                this.disabled = true;
                this.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Загрузка...';
                
                try {
                    const response = await fetch(`/Admin/DecryptLastName?userId=${userId}`);
                    const data = await response.json();
                    
                    if (data.success) {
                        span.textContent = data.lastName;
                        span.className = 'decrypted-name-' + userId + ' ms-2 badge bg-info text-white';
                        this.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-eye-slash"></i> Скрыть';
                    } else {
                        span.textContent = 'Ошибка: ' + (data.error || 'Неизвестная ошибка');
                        span.className = 'decrypted-name-' + userId + ' ms-2 text-danger';
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    span.textContent = 'Ошибка загрузки';
                    span.className = 'decrypted-name-' + userId + ' ms-2 text-danger';
                } finally {
                    this.disabled = false;
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}
    </div>
</div>


Views/Books/Details.cshtml
@model LibraryMPT.Models.Book

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = Model.Title;
    var hasSubscription = ViewBag.HasSubscription ?? false;
    var requiresSubscription = Model.RequiresSubscription;
    var canDownload = !requiresSubscription || hasSubscription;
}

<div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-lg-10">

            <div class="card border-0 shadow-lg rounded-4 overflow-hidden">
                <div class="row g-0">
                    
                    
                    <div class="col-md-4 position-relative">
                        <div class="book-cover-container h-100" style="min-height: 400px;">
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ImagePath))
                            {
                                <img src="@Model.ImagePath" 
                                     alt="@Model.Title" 
                                     class="w-100 h-100 object-fit-cover" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center"
                                     style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);">
                                    <div class="text-center text-white p-4">
                                        <i class="fas fa-book fa-5x mb-3 opacity-75"></i>
                                        <h5 class="mb-0">@Model.Title</h5>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                            
                            @if (requiresSubscription)
                            {
                                <div class="position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-3">
                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark px-3 py-2 shadow">
                                        <i class="fas fa-crown me-1"></i> Премиум
                                    </span>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    
                    <div class="col-md-8">
                        <div class="card-body p-4 p-lg-5">
                            
                            
                            <div class="mb-4">
                                <h1 class="fw-bold mb-2" style="color: var(--primary-dark);">
                                    @Model.Title
                                </h1>
                                <h5 class="text-muted">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user-pen me-2"></i>
                                    @(Model.Author != null ? $"{Model.Author.FirstName} {Model.Author.LastName}" : "Автор неизвестен")
                                </h5>
                            </div>

                            
                            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
                                @if (Model.Categories != null && Model.Categories.Count > 0)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 book-category-badge">
                                        <i class="fas fa-folder me-1"></i> @string.Join(", ", Model.Categories.Select(c => c.CategoryName))
                                    </span>
                                }
                                
                                @if (Model.Publisher != null)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-secondary px-3 py-2">
                                        <i class="fas fa-building me-1"></i> @Model.Publisher.PublisherName
                                    </span>
                                }
                                
                                @if (Model.PublishYear.HasValue)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-info details-info-badge px-3 py-2">
                                        <i class="fas fa-calendar me-1"></i> @Model.PublishYear
                                    </span>
                                }
                            </div>

                            
                            <div class="mb-4">
                                <h6 class="fw-bold text-uppercase text-muted mb-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-align-left me-2"></i>Описание
                                </h6>
                                <div class="p-3 rounded-3 book-description-box">
                                    @if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Description))
                                    {
                                        <p class="text-muted fst-italic mb-0">
                                            Описание отсутствует
                                        </p>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <p class="mb-0" style="line-height: 1.8;">
                                            @Model.Description
                                        </p>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            
                            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-3 mt-4 pt-3 border-top">
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.FilePath))
                                {
                                    if (canDownload)
                                    {
                                        <a asp-controller="Client"
                                           asp-action="Download"
                                           asp-route-id="@Model.BookID"
                                           class="btn btn-lg px-4"
                                           style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white;">
                                            <i class="fas fa-download me-2"></i>Скачать книгу
                                        </a>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-lg btn-secondary px-4" disabled>
                                            <i class="fas fa-lock me-2"></i>Доступ по подписке
                                        </button>
                                    }
                                }

                                <form asp-controller="Client" asp-action="MarkAsRead" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="bookId" value="@Model.BookID" />
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-lg btn-outline-success px-4">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Прочитано
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>

                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>

                
                <div class="card-footer bg-light p-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Назад в каталог
                    </a>
                    <span class="text-muted small">
                        <i class="fas fa-hashtag me-1"></i>ID: @Model.BookID
                    </span>
                </div>

            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Styles {
    <style>
        .book-cover-container img {
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .book-cover-container:hover img {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }
        
        .card {
            transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .card:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) !important;
        }
        
        .btn {
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        .book-category-badge {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%);
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .details-info-badge {
            color: #0f172a;
        }

        .book-description-box {
            background: #f8f9fa;
        }

        body.dark-theme .book-description-box {
            background: #111827;
            color: #e2e8f0;
            border: 1px solid #334155;
        }

        body.dark-theme .card-footer.bg-light {
            background: #1e293b !important;
            border-top-color: #334155 !important;
        }

        body.dark-theme .details-info-badge {
            background-color: #0f3a57 !important;
            color: #dbeafe !important;
        }
    </style>
}

Views/Books/Index.cshtml
@model IEnumerable<LibraryMPT.Models.Book>
@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Книги";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    ViewBag.ReadedBookIds = new List<int>();
    ViewBag.HasSubscription = false;
    ViewBag.IsReadedPage = false;
}
<div class="container py-4">
    <h2 class="mb-4"><i class="fas fa-book me-2"></i>Книги (@Model.Count())</h2>
    <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-4 g-4">
        @foreach (var book in Model)
        {
            @await Html.PartialAsync("_BookCard", book)
        }
    </div>
</div>

Views/Client/BookDetails.cshtml
@model LibraryMPT.Models.Book

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = Model.Title;
    var hasSubscription = ViewBag.HasSubscription ?? false;
    var requiresSubscription = Model.RequiresSubscription;
    var canRead = ViewBag.CanRead ?? false;
    var personalRequestStatus = ViewBag.PersonalRequestStatus as string;
    var canDownload = canRead; // в интерфейсе доступ по подписке связан с правом читать/скачивать
    var isGuest = User.IsInRole("Guest");
}

<div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-lg-10">

            @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
            {
                <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show mb-4" role="alert">
                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                </div>
            }

            @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
            {
                <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-4" role="alert">
                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Success"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                </div>
            }

            <div class="card border-0 shadow-lg rounded-4 overflow-hidden">
                <div class="row g-0">
                    
                    
                    <div class="col-md-4 position-relative">
                        <div class="book-cover-container h-100" style="min-height: 450px;">
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ImagePath))
                            {
                                <img src="@Model.ImagePath" 
                                     alt="@Model.Title" 
                                     class="w-100 h-100 object-fit-cover" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center"
                                     style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);">
                                    <div class="text-center text-white p-4">
                                        <i class="fas fa-book fa-5x mb-3 opacity-75"></i>
                                        <h5 class="mb-0">@Model.Title</h5>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                            
                            @if (requiresSubscription)
                            {
                                <div class="position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-3">
                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark px-3 py-2 shadow">
                                        <i class="fas fa-crown me-1"></i> Премиум
                                    </span>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    
                    <div class="col-md-8">
                        <div class="card-body p-4 p-lg-5">
                            
                            
                            <div class="mb-4">
                                <h1 class="fw-bold mb-2" style="color: var(--primary-dark, #2c3e50);">
                                    @Model.Title
                                </h1>
                                <h5 class="text-muted">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user-pen me-2"></i>
                                    @(Model.Author != null ? $"{Model.Author.FirstName} {Model.Author.LastName}" : "Автор неизвестен")
                                </h5>
                            </div>

                            
                            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
                                @if (Model.Categories != null && Model.Categories.Count > 0)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 book-category-badge">
                                        <i class="fas fa-folder me-1"></i> @string.Join(", ", Model.Categories.Select(c => c.CategoryName))
                                    </span>
                                }
                                
                                @if (Model.Publisher != null)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-secondary px-3 py-2">
                                        <i class="fas fa-building me-1"></i> @Model.Publisher.PublisherName
                                    </span>
                                }
                                
                                @if (Model.PublishYear.HasValue)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-info details-info-badge px-3 py-2">
                                        <i class="fas fa-calendar me-1"></i> @Model.PublishYear
                                    </span>
                                }
                            </div>

                            
                            <div class="mb-4">
                                <h6 class="fw-bold text-uppercase text-muted mb-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-align-left me-2"></i>Описание
                                </h6>
                                <div class="p-3 rounded-3 book-description-box">
                                    @if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Description))
                                    {
                                        <p class="text-muted fst-italic mb-0">
                                            Описание отсутствует
                                        </p>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <p class="mb-0" style="line-height: 1.8;">
                                            @Model.Description
                                        </p>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            
                            @if (requiresSubscription && !canRead)
                            {
                                <div class="alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-center mb-4" role="alert">
                                    <i class="fas fa-info-circle fa-lg me-3"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <strong>Эта книга доступна по подписке</strong><br>
                                        <small>
                                            @if (string.Equals(personalRequestStatus, "Pending", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                                            {
                                                <span>Заявка на доступ отправлена. Ожидайте рассмотрения.</span>
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                <span>Можно отправить заявку на доступ к этой книге.</span>
                                            }
                                        </small>
                                        @if (!isGuest && !string.Equals(personalRequestStatus, "Pending", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                                        {
                                            <form asp-controller="Client" asp-action="RequestBookAccess" method="post" class="mt-3">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="bookId" value="@Model.BookID" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary-custom w-100 py-2">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-paper-plane me-2"></i>Запросить доступ
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }

                            
                            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-3 mt-4 pt-3 border-top">
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.FilePath))
                                {
                                    if (canDownload)
                                    {
                                        <a asp-controller="Client"
                                           asp-action="ReadOnline"
                                           asp-route-id="@Model.BookID"
                                           class="btn btn-lg px-4"
                                           style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2ecc71 0%, #27ae60 100%); color: white;">
                                            <i class="fas fa-book-open me-2"></i>Читать онлайн
                                        </a>
                                        @if (!isGuest)
                                        {
                                            <a asp-controller="Client"
                                               asp-action="Download"
                                               asp-route-id="@Model.BookID"
                                               class="btn btn-lg px-4"
                                               style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white;">
                                                <i class="fas fa-download me-2"></i>Скачать книгу
                                            </a>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <button class="btn btn-lg btn-secondary px-4" disabled title="Скачивание недоступно для гостя">
                                                <i class="fas fa-download me-2"></i>Скачивание недоступно
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <button class="btn btn-lg btn-secondary px-4" disabled>
                                            <i class="fas fa-lock me-2"></i>Доступ по подписке
                                        </button>
                                    }
                                }

                                @if (!isGuest)
                                {
                                    <form asp-controller="Client" asp-action="MarkAsRead" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="bookId" value="@Model.BookID" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-lg btn-outline-success px-4">
                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Отметить прочитанным
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                }
                            </div>

                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>

                
                <div class="card-footer bg-light p-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Назад к каталогу
                    </a>
                    <span class="text-muted small">
                        <i class="fas fa-hashtag me-1"></i>ID: @Model.BookID
                    </span>
                </div>

            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Styles {
    <style>
        .book-cover-container img {
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .book-cover-container:hover img {
            transform: scale(1.02);
        }
        
        .card {
            transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .card:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 25px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) !important;
        }
        
        .btn {
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        .object-fit-cover {
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        .book-category-badge {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%);
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .details-info-badge {
            color: #0f172a;
        }

        .book-description-box {
            background: #f8f9fa;
        }

        body.dark-theme .book-description-box {
            background: #111827;
            color: #e2e8f0;
            border: 1px solid #334155;
        }

        body.dark-theme .card-footer.bg-light {
            background: #1e293b !important;
            border-top-color: #334155 !important;
        }

        body.dark-theme .details-info-badge {
            background-color: #0f3a57 !important;
            color: #dbeafe !important;
        }
    </style>
}


Views/Client/Cabinet.cshtml
@model LibraryMPT.Models.ClientCabinetResponse

@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Личный кабинет";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    var lastRead = Model?.LastRead ?? new List<LibraryMPT.Models.BookWithProgressDto>();
    var safeLastRead = lastRead.Where(x => x != null && x.Book != null).ToList();
    var readedBooks = (Model?.ReadedBooks ?? new List<LibraryMPT.Models.Book>())
        .Where(b => b != null)
        .ToList();
    var requestableBooks = (Model?.RequestableBooks ?? new List<LibraryMPT.Models.Book>())
        .Where(b => b != null)
        .ToList();
    var myBookRequests = Model?.MyBookRequests ?? new List<LibraryMPT.Models.BookRequestDto>();
    var progressByBookId = safeLastRead
        .GroupBy(x => x.Book.BookID)
        .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.First());
    var isGuest = User.IsInRole("Guest");
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1>
            <i class="fas fa-user-circle me-2"></i>
            Личный кабинет
        </h1>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
            <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="Readed" class="btn btn-outline-success">
                <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-1"></i> Прочитанные
            </a>
            <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-book me-1"></i> Каталог
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <h5 class="text-muted mb-3">
        <i class="fas fa-history me-2"></i>Последние читаемые книги
    </h5>

    @if (!safeLastRead.Any())
    {
        <div class="alert alert-info">
            <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
            Вы ещё не начали читать ни одной книги. Откройте книгу из каталога — прогресс будет сохраняться автоматически.
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-4 g-4">
            @foreach (var item in safeLastRead)
            {
                <div class="col">
                    <div class="card h-100 custom-card">
                        <div class="book-cover" style="height: 200px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #e2e8f0 100%);">
                            <img src="@(item.Book.ImagePath ?? "/images/placeholder-book.png")"
                                 class="img-fluid rounded-top w-100 h-100"
                                 style="object-fit: cover;"
                                 alt="@item.Book.Title" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h6 class="card-title">@item.Book.Title</h6>
                            <p class="text-muted small mb-2">
                                @if (item.Book.Author != null)
                                {
                                    @($"{item.Book.Author.FirstName} {item.Book.Author.LastName}")
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span>Автор не указан</span>
                                }
                            </p>
                            @if (item.Percent.HasValue && item.Percent > 0)
                            {
                                <div class="mb-2">
                                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between small text-muted mb-1">
                                        <span>Прогресс</span>
                                        <span>@item.Percent%</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="progress" style="height: 6px;">
                                        <div class="progress-bar bg-primary" role="progressbar"
                                             style="width: @(Math.Min(100, item.Percent.Value))%"></div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                            <div class="d-grid gap-1">
                                <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="ReadOnline" asp-route-id="@item.Book.BookID"
                                   class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-book-open me-1"></i>
                                    @((item.Percent ?? 0) > 0 ? "Продолжить чтение" : "Читать")
                                </a>
                                <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="BookDetails" asp-route-id="@item.Book.BookID"
                                   class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i> Подробнее
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }

    <hr class="my-4" />

    <h5 class="text-muted mb-3">
        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Прочитанные книги
    </h5>
    @if (!readedBooks.Any())
    {
        <div class="alert alert-light border">
            Пока нет отмеченных прочитанных книг.
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-3 g-3">
            @foreach (var book in readedBooks.Take(18))
            {
                <div class="col">
                    <div class="card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h6 class="card-title mb-1">@book.Title</h6>
                            <p class="small text-muted mb-2">
                                @if (book.Author != null)
                                {
                                    @($"{book.Author.FirstName} {book.Author.LastName}")
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span>Автор не указан</span>
                                }
                            </p>
                            @if (progressByBookId.TryGetValue(book.BookID, out var p) && p.Percent.HasValue)
                            {
                                <div class="small text-muted mb-2">Прогресс: @p.Percent%</div>
                            }
                            <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                                <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="BookDetails" asp-route-id="@book.BookID" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">
                                    Подробнее
                                </a>
                                <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="ReadOnline" asp-route-id="@book.BookID" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                    Читать
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }

    <hr class="my-4" />

    <h5 class="text-muted mb-3">
        <i class="fas fa-paper-plane me-2"></i>Запрос доступа к конкретной книге
    </h5>
    @if (!requestableBooks.Any())
    {
        <div class="alert alert-light border">
            Нет книг, по которым можно отправить новый запрос (либо уже есть активный доступ/заявка).
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 g-3">
            @foreach (var book in requestableBooks.Take(12))
            {
                <div class="col">
                    <div class="card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-2">
                                <div>
                                    <h6 class="card-title mb-1">@book.Title</h6>
                                    <div class="small text-muted">ID: @book.BookID</div>
                                </div>
                                @if (book.RequiresSubscription)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">По подписке</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-3 d-flex gap-2">
                                <a asp-controller="Client" asp-action="BookDetails" asp-route-id="@book.BookID" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">
                                    Открыть
                                </a>
                                @if (!isGuest)
                                {
                                    <form asp-controller="Client" asp-action="RequestBookAccess" method="post">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="bookId" value="@book.BookID" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Отправить запрос</button>
                                    </form>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }

    <hr class="my-4" />

    <h5 class="text-muted mb-3">
        <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Мои заявки на доступ
    </h5>
    @if (!myBookRequests.Any())
    {
        <div class="alert alert-light border">
            Вы еще не отправляли заявки на доступ к книгам.
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-sm align-middle">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Книга</th>
                        <th>Статус</th>
                        <th>Отправлена</th>
                        <th>Решение</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var request in myBookRequests)
                    {
                        var statusRaw = request.Status ?? "Pending";
                        var status = statusRaw.ToLowerInvariant();
                        var badgeClass = status == "approved"
                            ? "bg-success"
                            : status == "rejected"
                                ? "bg-danger"
                                : "bg-warning text-dark";
                        <tr>
                            <td>@request.BookTitle</td>
                            <td><span class="badge @badgeClass">@statusRaw</span></td>
                            <td>@request.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                            <td>@(request.DecidedAt.HasValue ? request.DecidedAt.Value.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm") : "—")</td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    }
</div>

Views/Client/Index.cshtml
@model IEnumerable<LibraryMPT.Models.Book>

@{
    ViewBag.Title = "Библиотека книг";
    Layout = "_Layout";
    var readed = ViewBag.ReadedBookIds as List<int>;
    var categories = ViewBag.Categories as List<LibraryMPT.Models.Category> ?? new List<LibraryMPT.Models.Category>();
    var selectedCategoryIds = ViewBag.CategoryIds as int[] ?? Array.Empty<int>();
    int totalBooks = ViewBag.TotalBooks as int? ?? 0;
    int readedCount = ViewBag.Readed as int? ?? 0;
    string subscriptionStatus = ViewBag.SubscriptionStatus as string ?? "—";
}

<div class="container fade-in">
    @if (TempData["Error"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show mb-4" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>@TempData["Error"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-start align-items-md-center mb-5">
        <div class="mb-4 mb-md-0">
            <h1 class="mb-2">
                <i class="fas fa-book-open me-3"></i>Добро пожаловать в библиотеку!
            </h1>
            <p class="lead text-muted">Откройте для себя мир литературы и знаний</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Home")" class="btn btn-light-custom btn-custom">
                <i class="fas fa-home"></i> На главную
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row mb-5 justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6 mb-4">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-book fa-2x mb-3 text-primary-medium"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@totalBooks</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Доступно книг</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6 mb-4">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-star fa-2x mb-3 text-primary-medium"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@readedCount</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Прочитано</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6 mb-4">
            <div class="stat-card text-center">
                <i class="fas fa-id-card fa-2x mb-3 text-primary-medium"></i>
                <div class="stat-number">@subscriptionStatus</div>
                <div class="stat-label">Подписка вашего учебного заведения</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <form method="get" asp-controller="Client" asp-action="Index" class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <input type="text"
                   name="search"
                   value="@ViewBag.Search"
                   class="form-control"
                   placeholder="🔍 Поиск по названию или описанию" />
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label small text-muted">Категории (жанры)</label>
            <select name="categoryIds" multiple class="form-select" size="4" title="Удерживайте Ctrl для выбора нескольких">
                @foreach (var cat in categories)
                {
                    if (selectedCategoryIds.Contains(cat.CategoryID))
                    {
                        <option value="@cat.CategoryID" selected>@cat.CategoryName</option>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <option value="@cat.CategoryID">@cat.CategoryName</option>
                    }
                }
            </select>
            <small class="text-muted">Ctrl+клик — несколько жанров</small>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-2 d-grid">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary-custom">
                Найти
            </button>
        </div>
    </form>

    <h2 class="mb-4">
        <i class="fas fa-books me-3"></i>Каталог книг
        <small class="text-muted fs-6 ms-2">(@Model.Count() книг)</small>
    </h2>

    <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-4 g-4 mb-5">
        @foreach (var book in Model)
        {
            @await Html.PartialAsync("_BookCard", book)
        }
    </div>

</div>

        .book-card {

            }

        .book-cover {

Views/Client/ReadOnline.cshtml
@model LibraryMPT.Models.Book

@{

}

<div class="container-fluid p-0 reader-wrapper" id="readerWrapper">

        }

            margin: 0.8rem 0;

@section Scripts {
    
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.min.js"></script>
    
    <script src="~/lib/jszip/jszip.min.js"></script>
    
    <script src="~/lib/epubjs/epub.min.js"></script>
    
    <script>
        function loadScript(src) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const script = document.createElement('script');
                script.src = src;
                script.async = true;
                script.onload = () => resolve();
                script.onerror = () => reject(new Error(`Failed to load ${src}`));
                document.head.appendChild(script);
            });
        }

        function ensureZipLib() {
            if (window.JSZip) {
                return Promise.resolve();
            }

            const fallbacks = [
                '/lib/jszip/jszip.min.js',
                'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jszip@3.10.1/dist/jszip.min.js',
                'https://unpkg.com/jszip@3.10.1/dist/jszip.min.js'
            ];

            let chain = Promise.reject();
            fallbacks.forEach(src => {
                chain = chain.catch(() => loadScript(src));
            });

            return chain.then(() => {
                if (!window.JSZip) {
                    throw new Error('JSZip library not available');
                }
            });
        }

        function ensureEpubLib() {
            if (window.ePub) {
                return Promise.resolve();
            }

            const fallbacks = [
                '/lib/epubjs/epub.min.js',
                'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/epubjs@0.3.93/dist/epub.min.js',
                'https://unpkg.com/epubjs@0.3.93/dist/epub.min.js'
            ];

            let chain = Promise.reject();
            fallbacks.forEach(src => {
                chain = chain.catch(() => loadScript(src));
            });

            return chain.then(() => {
                if (!window.ePub) {
                    throw new Error('ePub library not available');
                }
            });
        }

        function ensurePdfLib() {
            if (window.pdfjsLib?.getDocument) {
                return Promise.resolve();
            }

            const fallbacks = [
                '/lib/pdfjs/pdf.min.js',
                'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.min.js',
                'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pdfjs-dist@3.11.174/build/pdf.min.js'
            ];

            let chain = Promise.reject();
            fallbacks.forEach(src => {
                chain = chain.catch(() => loadScript(src));
            });

            return chain.then(() => {
                if (!window.pdfjsLib?.getDocument) {
                    throw new Error('pdf.js library not available');
                }
            });
        }

        const config = {
            bookId: @bookId,
            fileType: @Html.Raw(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(fileType ?? "unknown")),
            fileUrl: @Html.Raw(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(fileUrl ?? "")),
            fontSize: parseInt(localStorage.getItem('readerFontSize')) || 16,
            fontFamily: localStorage.getItem('readerFontFamily') || 'serif',
            darkTheme: (() => {
                const readerTheme = localStorage.getItem('readerDarkTheme');
                if (readerTheme === null) {
                    return localStorage.getItem('siteTheme') === 'dark';
                }
                return readerTheme === 'true';
            })(),
            savedProgress: @Html.Raw(savedProgress != null ? System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(new { lastPage = savedProgress.LastPage, lastPosition = savedProgress.LastPosition, percent = savedProgress.Percent }) : "null")
        };

        function syncReaderLayoutMetrics() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('readerWrapper');
            const header = document.querySelector('.reader-header');
            if (!wrapper || !header) return;
            const headerHeight = Math.max(56, Math.round(header.getBoundingClientRect().height));
            wrapper.style.setProperty('--reader-header-height', `${headerHeight}px`);
        }

        window.addEventListener('resize', syncReaderLayoutMetrics, { passive: true });
        window.addEventListener('orientationchange', syncReaderLayoutMetrics);
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', syncReaderLayoutMetrics);
        requestAnimationFrame(syncReaderLayoutMetrics);

        function showReaderMessage(message, type = 'warning') {
            const alert = document.getElementById('readerAlert');
            if (!alert) return;
            alert.className = `alert alert-${type} reader-alert`;
            alert.textContent = message;
            alert.style.display = 'block';
        }

        function hideReaderMessage() {
            const alert = document.getElementById('readerAlert');
            if (!alert) return;
            alert.style.display = 'none';
        }

        const readerErrorPanelStages = new Set([
            'window-error', 'unhandledrejection', 'script-crash',
            'pdf-fetch', 'pdf-no-viewer', 'pdf-final',
            'epub-open-failed', 'epub-ready', 'epub-render-timeout', 'epub-fetch-buffer', 'epub-buffer-fallback', 'epub-final', 'epub-lib',
            'text-fetch', 'fb2-zip', 'text-final'
        ]);

        let readerErrorLogBlocks = [];

        function buildReaderErrorDump(stage, error, detail) {
            const lines = [];
            lines.push('=== LibraryMPT reader error ===');
            lines.push(`time (UTC): ${new Date().toISOString()}`);
            lines.push(`stage: ${stage}`);
            lines.push(`bookId: ${config.bookId}  fileType: ${JSON.stringify(config.fileType)}`);
            lines.push(`page URL: ${window.location.href}`);
            lines.push(`fileUrl: ${config.fileUrl}`);
            lines.push(`viewport: ${window.innerWidth}x${window.innerHeight}  devicePixelRatio: ${window.devicePixelRatio}`);
            lines.push(`userAgent: ${navigator.userAgent}`);
            if (detail) lines.push(`detail: ${detail}`);
            if (error) {
